changes.field: Stale execution token — FE-R1 token not cleared
changes.finding: automation_bus/state/work_package_active.json currently contains {work_id: FE-R1, status: STARTED}. FE-R1 is demonstrably COMPLETE on main (kernel COMPLETE commit 2ab7f48 present), but the kernel-managed token file was not deleted on finish. This file is untracked by git (no commit history). Cursor will STOP at the token verification step if work_package_active.json still says FE-R1 when FE-R2 starts. It is not yet known whether run_work_package.py start will overwrite or reject an existing stale token. Resolution must be confirmed by GPT or human before Cursor executes.
changes.resolution: Human or GPT must explicitly authorise one of: (a) manually delete work_package_active.json before running start, or (b) confirm that run_work_package.py start overwrites stale tokens. Do not proceed past Stage 3 without confirming this.

changes.finding: Branch frontend/fe-r2-results-journey-restructure does not exist locally or remotely. This is expected workflow — Cursor must create it from main as the first Step 0 action before kernel start. The prompt Stage 0 preflight is correctly written to detect this. Not a prompt defect.
changes.resolution: Cursor must create the branch from current main before running run_work_package.py start. Stage 0 compliance requires branch to be created first.

changes.finding: The sprint's behavioural scope is frontend rendering order and section visibility. Backend analytical output is explicitly unchanged — forbidden files list excludes all backend/core/analytics/*, backend/core/scoring/*, backend/core/pipeline/*. The determinism risk is surfacing previously hidden DTO fields to retail users; this is intentional and controlled by the section spec. No unintended analytical drift is possible within the defined permitted file set.

changes.field: Sentinel — new defect classes required, no existing fe_r2 pack
changes.finding: The prompt requires creation of seven new Sentinel defect classes (retail_results_journey_wrong_order, body_overview_not_first, etc.). No existing sentinel/packs/fe_r2_*.json exists. Cursor must create the new pack. Each class must point to an active deterministic test. The 'No placeholder Sentinel entries' rule applies. This is implementation scope for Cursor, not a prompt defect.
changes.resolution: Advisory only. Cursor should create the Sentinel pack as part of the sprint scope.
